name: Spectrum Ultra Premium Adult Cat Food - Hairball34 Hairball Control 2kg
description: Spectrum Hairball34 , is a specially formulated complete and balanced ultra-premium food to meet the nutritional requirements of adult cats at moulting period or when having an excessive hair shedding problem. PREVENTION OF HAIRBALL FORMATION: The nutritional concept of Spectrum Adult Cat Hairball34 is focused to limit hairball formation and prevent undesired sign of hairball symptoms (vomiting, retching and coughing) by avoiding stimulation of the stomach and encouraging excretion of accumulated hairs from the stomach to the intestines. COAT AND SKIN CARE: Hairball34 contains highly bioavailable marine phospholipids to strengthen the skin barrier and coat, ensuring optimal health. INTESTINAL HEALTH: Hairball34 contains fructo-oligosaccharides to stabilize intestinal flora, promoting optimal intestinal health and digestive comfort.   SYNOX 3D: a blend of natural, standardised GMO free - titrated plant extracts (Rosemary, grape seed, curcuma, citrus and cloves) clinically proven in cats to counter free radicals induced by oxidative cell damage . Free radicals are essential for life. However, ageing is linked to an increased production of free radicals and a decreased ability to counter their negative effects on health and wellbeing. SYNOX 3D limits the production of malondialdehyde, one of the main toxic metabolites of oxidative stress, protecting cell membrane, mitochondria and genetic material of each individual cell. The unique composition of SYNOX 3D is the result of a screening process on 134 plant extracts, combined with trials in laboratory conditions and a successful clinical trial run in pets. Potential health benefits include increased resistance against oxidative stress, improved life-span and immune stimulation.   Fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS): stimulate growth and metabolism of beneficial bacteria for the intestine of cats. Ingredients: Dehydrated chicken protein, rice, chicken fat, hydrolysed bagasse fibre, potato flour, dried antarctic krill (euphausia superba), hydrolysed chicken liver, brewer's yeast, carob flour, blueberry extract, psyllium husks, yucca schidigera, L-carnitine, fructo-oligosaccharides (300ppm), rosmarinus sp. - curcuma sp. - vitis sp. - citrus sp.- eugenia sp. (300ppm). Additives: Vitamin A (E-672): 18000 IU/kg, Vitamin D3 (E-671): 1500 IU/kg, Vitamin E (3A700): 200 mg/kg, Vitamin C (E301): 200 mg/kg, Taurin: 1500 mg, Iron (E1): 320 mg/kg, Iodine (E2): 1.5 mg/kg, Copper (E4): 45 mg/kg, Manganese (E5): 20 mg/kg, Zinc (E6): 180 mg/kg, Selenium (E8): 0.9 mg/kg, Preservatives - Antioxidants. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein .................................. 34% Fat ........................................14% Crude Ash ...........................7% Cellulose (Fiber).....................6% IMPORTANT TO KNOW: The table shows the recommended daily feeding amounts (grams/day) for your kitten's age (months). Daily feeding amounts may vary depending on the outside temperature, your cat's living conditions (indoor/outdoor), habits and activity. To ensure your cat is at an ideal weight, it is important to weigh out the amount of food. Assessing your cat's appetite, appearance, and stool will help you adjust feeding amounts appropriately. The transition from one formula to the other should be done gradually, giving small amounts of both formulas over the course of a week after mixing. Always keep clean, fresh water near the bowl. Even if the water looks clean, change it at least once a day. Store the product in a cool, dry place and ensure that the package is tightly closed after each use. You can see the production date and recommended consumption date, batch code and factory approval number on the packaging.
